responsibilities: Design and build interactive dashboards and reports that provide real-time visibility into key business metrics
Develop and optimize DAX measures and calculated fields to support complex business reporting logic
Build and maintain ETL processes that feed accurate, timely data into business intelligence platforms
Collaborate with business stakeholders to gather reporting requirements and translate them into BI solutions
Implement row-level security and access controls to ensure appropriate data visibility across user groups
Optimize report and dashboard performance by tuning data models, queries, and refresh schedules
Maintain a centralized semantic data model that ensures consistent metrics across all BI reports
Train business users on self-service BI tools to reduce dependency on ad hoc reporting requests
Automate recurring reports and alerts to reduce manual effort and improve data-driven decision speed
Troubleshoot and resolve data discrepancies between source systems and BI reporting layers
